---
title: Parameter Estimation
format:
    html:
        page-layout: full
metadata-files:
  - metadata/matthewferrari.yml
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vTNiGpw-dPKzfZT-X7ilwzyj2juE5EQIxEJWuiPJKZx-Zj6TUhBvqfWqpG8g1D34w/pubembed?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000" frameborder="0" width="1023" height="606" allowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true"></iframe>
```

[Download slides as PDF](./slides/L05_Parameter-estimation.pptx.pdf)
